arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah dismisses Liverpool Premier League title doubters - 'I hate the idea'
arts.sum: Mohammed Salah thinks Liverpool can win every trophy they are competing for as he hits back at claims Arne Slot's men should be carrying the underdog tag in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Marmoush makes January decision as Arsenal face Liverpool threat
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush will not move in January, according to German media. Arsenal and Liverpool are the sides that have been most prominently linked with the striker, while Eintracht Frankfurt are keen to get him to extend his contract.
